title: hemionitis pumilio
intro: Hemionitis pumilio, also known as Eastern Ostrich Fern or Lady Fern, is a deciduous, perennial fern species native to eastern North America. The medicinal properties of Hemionitis pumilio have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, inflammation, and skin conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing digestive issues. Hemionitis pumilio is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
